items.title: AI stocks are in a bubble. Why are so many investors refusing to believe it?
items.description: AI companies are raising prices and alienating users — and the stocks are overvalued.

items.title: X-energy, Amazon, Korea Hydro & Nuclear Power, and Doosan Enerbility Announce Partnership to Scale Advanced Nuclear Energy for AI Infrastructure
items.description: WASHINGTON, August 25, 2025--X-energy, Amazon, KHNP, and Doosan sign strategic collaboration agreement to accelerate the deployment of new Xe-100 advanced nuclear reactors

items.title: A $10 Billion Reason to Buy This Quantum Computing Stock Now
items.description: Honeywell's quantum computing subsidiary has seen its valuation double in just 18 months.

items.title: Boring Is Better. These 3 Stocks Prove It.
items.description: Torsten Sløk, the chief economist at Apollo Global Management, says some big tech stocks are being outdone by what might be considered ho-hum names.

items.title: Amazon Rebounds From Post-Q2 Selloff. Is Amazon Stock A Buy?
items.description: Amazon stock has rebounded from a selloff that following its Q2 results in late July but is still below 2025 highs.
